name_cn:
Top-tier replica Dior
Medium Black Bobby in stock!!️
Latest Bobby Calfskin series, named in tribute to Monsieur Dior's pet dog, symbolizing loyalty and success, so this is a bag that will stay with you forever 😘. Combining classic and fashion, the retro shape interprets the freedom, confidence, and elegance of independent women 💃🏻. Absolutely love it ❤️
size:22*17*6cm
